title: Skills
subtitle: Browse and manage AI capabilities
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Local skills are still available, but runtime status is unavailable.
gatewayStarting: Gateway is starting. Local skills are available now; runtime status will appear once it is ready.

detail.author: Author
detail.apiKeyDesc: The primary API key for this skill. Leave blank if not required or configured elsewhere.
detail.envNote: Note: Rows with empty keys will be automatically removed during save.

sections.title: Contents
sections.empty: This skill has no previewable files.
sections.scanFailed: Failed to scan the skill directory

toast.failedFolderNotFound: Skills folder does not exist yet. Install a skill first.
toast.failedOpenActualFolder: Failed to open actual skill folder
toast.searchTimeoutError: Search timed out, check network. You can also search on the ClawHub China mirror, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installTimeoutError: Installation timed out, check network. You can also download the ZIP from the ClawHub China mirror and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.searchRateLimitError: Search rate limit exceeded. You can also search on the ClawHub China mirror, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installRateLimitError: Installation rate limit exceeded. You can also download the ZIP from the ClawHub China mirror and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.fetchTimeoutError: Fetching skills timed out, please check your network connection.
toast.fetchRateLimitError: Fetching skills rate limit exceeded, please try again later.
toast.noBatchEnableTargets: All visible skills are already enabled.
toast.noBatchDisableTargets: All visible skills are already disabled.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.installDialogSubtitle: Browse the SkillHub China marketplace by default, or enter keywords to search.
marketplace.installUnavailableDescription: The skill marketplace is currently browse-only and cannot install skills from the client.
marketplace.unavailable: Skill marketplace is unavailable. Retry later or check the OpenClaw runtime components.
marketplace.homeSubtitle: Browse the SkillHub China marketplace, explore tens of thousands of skills, and install them into the local OpenClaw skills directory.
marketplace.browseOnlyHomeSubtitle: Browse the SkillHub China marketplace. This runtime does not currently support direct installs from the client.
marketplace.searchSubtitle: Showing marketplace skills that match your search.
marketplace.publisherLanguageNote: UClaw shows Chinese descriptions from SkillHub when available. Skill names and some metadata may still follow the publisher's original language.
marketplace.securityNote: Click a skill card to view its documentation and source information before installation.
marketplace.manualInstallHint: Network issues? You can download skill ZIP archives from SkillHub or ClawHub and extract them manually into "{{path}}".
marketplace.noResults: No skills found matching your search.
marketplace.noCategoryResults: No skills in this category yet.
marketplace.emptyPrompt: Search for new skills to expand your capabilities.
marketplace.searchError: Marketplace search failed. Check your connection or retry later.
